    About

    This open educational website was created as part of MIT 20.365/20.465: Engineering the Immune System in Cancer and Beyond (Spring 2026), taught by Professor Jessica Stark and Professor Dane Wittrup.

    Team

    Get in Touch

    We’d love to hear from you! Whether you’re a student curious about the field, a researcher interested in collaborating, or just someone who stumbled onto this page and has questions - don’t hesitate to reach out! We genuinely enjoy connecting with people who care about maternal-fetal science.
